languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, maybe we can do without the non-standard reasoning? We don't have a clue how this... thing works. I'd rather collect statues in my luxurious quarters than be a new addition to someone else's collection."

languages.text: "Почтенный генетор, может быть, обойдемся без нестандартного мышления? Неизвестно, как эта... штука вообще работает. Предпочту коллекционировать статуи в своей роскошной каюте, а не пополнить собой чью-то коллекцию".

"Esteemed Genetor, maybe we can do without the non-standard reasoning? We don't have a clue how this... thing works. I'd rather collect statues in my luxurious quarters than be a new addition to someone else's collection."
languages.original_text: "Почтенный генетор, может быть, обойдемся без нестандартного мышления? Неизвестно, как эта... штука вообще работает. Предпочту коллекционировать статуи в своей роскошной каюте, а не пополнить собой чью-то коллекцию".

traits.locale_text: "Esteemed Genetor, maybe we can do without the non-standard reasoning? We don't have a clue how this... thing works. I'd rather collect statues in my luxurious quarters than be a new addition to someone else's collection."

"Esteemed Genetor, maybe we can do without the non-standard reasoning? We don't have a clue how this... thing works. I'd rather collect statues in my luxurious quarters than be a new addition to someone else's collection."

"Esteemed Genetor, maybe we can do without the non-standard reasoning? We don't have a clue how this... thing works. I'd rather collect statues in my luxurious quarters than be a new addition to someone else's collection."

languages.text: 「尊敬するジェネトール、もしかしたら、非標準的な推理は不要かもしれませんね。この…もの、どう機能しているのか全くわかりません。豪華な私室で像を集める方が、他人のコレクションに加わるよりもよいですよ」
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, maybe we can do without the non-standard reasoning? We don't have a clue how this... thing works. I'd rather collect statues in my luxurious quarters than be a new addition to someone else's collection."

traits.locale_text: 「尊敬するジェネトール、もしかしたら、非標準的な推理は不要かもしれませんね。この…もの、どう機能しているのか全くわかりません。豪華な私室で像を集める方が、他人のコレクションに加わるよりもよいですよ。」

languages.text: « Vénérable genetor, ne pourrions-nous pas nous passer de raisonnement atypique ? Nous n'avons pas la moindre idée de la façon dont cet... engin fonctionne. Je préférerais amasser des statues dans mes luxueux quartiers plutôt que d'être ajoutée à la collection de quelqu'un d'autre. »
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, maybe we can do without the non-standard reasoning? We don't have a clue how this... thing works. I'd rather collect statues in my luxurious quarters than be a new addition to someone else's collection."

traits.locale_text: « Vénérable genetor, ne pourrions-nous pas nous passer de raisonnement atypique ? Nous n'avons pas la moindre idée de la façon dont cet... engin fonctionne. Je préférerais amasser des statues dans mes luxueux quartiers plutôt que d'être ajoutée à la collection de quelqu'un d'autre. »

languages.text: "Geschätzter Genetor, vielleicht geht es auch ohne eine atypische Denkweise? Wir haben keine Ahnung, wie dieses ... Ding funktioniert. Ich würde lieber Statuen für meine eigenen Gemächer sammeln, als selbst zu einem Sammelstück zu werden."
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, maybe we can do without the non-standard reasoning? We don't have a clue how this... thing works. I'd rather collect statues in my luxurious quarters than be a new addition to someone else's collection."

traits.locale_text: "Geschätzter Genetor, vielleicht geht es auch ohne eine atypische Denkweise? Wir haben keine Ahnung, wie dieses ... Ding funktioniert. Ich würde lieber Statuen für meine eigenen Gemächer sammeln, als selbst zu einem Sammelstück zu werden."

languages.text: "Saygıdeğer Genetör, belki standart dışı mantık yürütme olmadan da idare edebiliriz. Bu... Şeyin nasıl çalıştığına dair hiçbir fikrimiz yok. Başkasının koleksiyonuna yeni bir ek olmaktansa lüks odamda heykel biriktirmeyi tercih ederim."
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, maybe we can do without the non-standard reasoning? We don't have a clue how this... thing works. I'd rather collect statues in my luxurious quarters than be a new addition to someone else's collection."

traits.locale_text: "Saygıdeğer Genetör, belki standart dışı mantık yürütme olmadan da idare edebiliriz. Bu... Şeyin nasıl çalıştığına dair hiçbir fikrimiz yok. Başkasının koleksiyonuna yeni bir ek olmaktansa lüks odamda heykel biriktirmeyi tercih ederim."

languages.text: «Estimado genetor, ¿y si prescindimos de la mentalidad poco ortodoxa? No tenemos ni idea de cómo funciona esta... cosa. Prefiero coleccionar estatuas en mis lujosos aposentos antes que incorporarme yo misma a una colección ajena».
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, maybe we can do without the non-standard reasoning? We don't have a clue how this... thing works. I'd rather collect statues in my luxurious quarters than be a new addition to someone else's collection."

traits.locale_text: «Estimado genetor, ¿y si prescindimos de la mentalidad poco ortodoxa? No tenemos ni idea de cómo funciona esta... cosa. Prefiero coleccionar estatuas en mis lujosos aposentos antes que incorporarme yo misma a una colección ajena».

languages.text: “尊敬的基因士，或许我们可以不用什么‘非常规思维’？我们压根搞不懂这……东西的运作原理。我宁可在我奢华的舱室里收藏雕塑，也不想成为别人收藏的新展品。”
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, maybe we can do without the non-standard reasoning? We don't have a clue how this... thing works. I'd rather collect statues in my luxurious quarters than be a new addition to someone else's collection."

traits.locale_text: “尊敬的基因士，或许我们可以不用什么‘非常规思维’？我们压根搞不懂这……东西的运作原理。我宁可在我奢华的舱室里收藏雕塑，也不想成为别人收藏的新展品。”
